holdings.infoBox: EMQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 68 individual holdings. The top holdings are MercadoLibre stock at 8.13%, Reliance Industries at 7.99%, Tencent Holdings at 6.69%, Alibaba Group Holding at 6.58%, and PDD Holdings at 6.23%.

overview.description: The EMQQ Emerging Markets Internet ETF (EMQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the EMQQ The Emerging Markets Internet index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies producing most of their revenue from internet or ecommerce activity in emerging markets. EMQQ was launched on Nov 13, 2014 and is issued by EMQQ Global.
infoTable: EMQQ The Emerging Markets Internet Index
